title: Horrible Villager Trades
body:
*Worse Villagers* makes villager trades terrible, turning them into horrible deals. ### Features: - **Better prices**: All trades now cost a full stack (64) of items, making them way too expensive. - **Diamonds equipment to leather**: Trades that used to give diamonds now give leather instead. - **No durability**: All traded items have only 1 durability. If you hate your live, or want even more reasons to kill the villagers, this mod is perfect for you.














The *Auto Trader* from *Easy Villagers* skips the changes. Use this feature (not a bug) while you can.
